identity.name: HDFC Hybrid Equity Fund Direct Plan Growth

operations.exit_load: Exit Load for units in excess of 15% of the investment,1% will be charged for redemption within 1 year.
operations.taxation: Returns are taxed at 20%, if you redeem before one year. After 1 year, you are required to pay LTCG tax of 12.5% on returns of Rs 1.25 lakh+ in a financial year.

fund_manager.name: Anupam Joshi
fund_manager.experience_summary: Prior to joining HDFC Mutual Fund he has worked with IDFC AMC, Principal Asset Management Company and ICAP India Pvt. Ltd.
